A

activate(List<Integer>, int) - Static method in class model.phases.APhase
Removes obsolete times, consumes the earliest remaining scheduled time, and returns it as the next simulation time.
activate(EventQueue, int) - Static method in class model.phases.BPhase
Processes all eligible phase-B events at the supplied simulation time.
activate(EventQueue, Simulation, int) - Static method in class model.phases.CPhase
Processes routing events that are due at or before the supplied time.
addData(int, int, double) - Method in class controller.Controller
Adds a data point for both graph series on the JavaFX application thread.
addDetails(String) - Method in class controller.Controller
Appends detail text to the UI details log on the JavaFX application thread.
addDetails(String) - Method in class model.Simulation
Writes a detail message to the UI when a controller is attached.
addToPhaseQueue(Customer, int) - Method in class model.PhaseQueue
Adds a customer to a phase-specific queue.
addToQueue(Event) - Method in class model.EventQueue
Adds a scheduled event to the queue.
APhase - Class in model.phases
Phase A of the simulation, responsible for selecting the next scheduled time that should be processed.
APhase() - Constructor for class model.phases.APhase
 
App - Class in view
JavaFX application entry point for the simulation UI.
App() - Constructor for class view.App
 

B

BPhase - Class in model.phases
Phase B of the simulation, responsible for processing service start and end events scheduled for the current time.
BPhase() - Constructor for class model.phases.BPhase
 

C

compareTo(Event) - Method in class model.Event
Orders events by scheduled time for priority-queue processing.
controller - package controller
 
Controller - Class in controller
JavaFX controller for the simulation UI, including input parsing, graph updates, delay controls, and status text updates.
Controller() - Constructor for class controller.Controller
Creates a controller instance for JavaFX or tests.
countByType(Event.Type) - Method in class model.EventQueue
Counts queued events of a specific type.
countRoutingsInSystem(int) - Method in class model.EventQueue
Counts routing events whose customers have already entered the system.
CPhase - Class in model.phases
Phase C of the simulation, responsible for routing waiting customers to an available service point or rescheduling them when all parallels are busy.
CPhase() - Constructor for class model.phases.CPhase
 
Customer - Class in model
Stores timing information for a simulated customer.

D

decDelay() - Method in class model.Simulation
Decreases the UI animation delay by ten percent.
delay - Variable in class model.Simulation
 
Detailinator - Class in controller
Utility for formatting detail log text before it is displayed in the UI.
Detailinator() - Constructor for class controller.Detailinator
 

E

enableButton() - Method in class controller.Controller
Re-enables the start button after a simulation stops or fails.
END_SERVICE - Enum constant in enum class model.Event.Type
Ends service for a customer at a service point.
endService() - Method in class model.ServicePoint
Finishes the current service, records utilization, and routes or completes the customer.
equals(int) - Method in class model.serviceObjects.ServicePointTree
Checks whether this node's service point has the requested identifier.
Event - Class in model
Represents a scheduled simulation event and the service point it targets.
Event(int, ServicePoint) - Constructor for class model.Event
Creates a routing event whose arrival time matches its event time.
Event(int, ServicePoint, Event.Type) - Constructor for class model.Event
Creates an event whose arrival time matches its event time.
Event(int, ServicePoint, Event.Type, int) - Constructor for class model.Event
Creates an event with an explicit original customer arrival time.
Event.Type - Enum Class in model
Supported event types in the simulation pipeline.
EventQueue - Class in model
Thread-safe priority queue for scheduled simulation events.
EventQueue() - Constructor for class model.EventQueue
 

F

find(int) - Method in class model.serviceObjects.ServicePointTree
Searches this subtree for a service point identifier.

G

getActiveServices() - Method in class model.serviceObjects.ServicePointTree
Counts busy service points across this subtree.
getActiveTime() - Method in class model.ServicePoint
Gets this point's accumulated active serving time.
getAllServicePoints() - Method in class model.serviceObjects.ServicePointTree
Gets every unique service point in this subtree, including shared tier-four services only once.
getArrivalTime() - Method in class model.Event
Gets the original arrival time of the customer represented by this event.
getArrived() - Method in class model.ServicePoint
Gets the number of customers that have started service here.
getAverageServingTime() - Method in class model.serviceObjects.ServicePointTree
Calculates average serving time for completed customers across the subtree.
getChild(int) - Method in class model.serviceObjects.ServicePointTree
Gets a child node's service point by index.
getCompletedCustomerCount() - Method in class model.ServicePoint
Gets the completed customer count used in average-service-time calculations.
getCompletedServingTime() - Method in class model.ServicePoint
Gets completed serving time used in average-service-time calculations.
getCurrentParallel(ServicePoint) - Static method in class model.serviceObjects.ServicePointType
Chooses the current service point or one of its parallels if available now.
getCurrentParallel(ServicePoint, int) - Static method in class model.serviceObjects.ServicePointType
Chooses the current service point or one of its parallels if available at a future time.
getCustomersInSystem() - Method in class model.serviceObjects.ServicePointTree
Counts customers currently being served in this subtree.
getCustomersInSystem() - Method in class model.ServicePoint
Gets the number of customers currently associated with this service point.
getCustomersInSystem() - Method in class model.Simulation
Counts customers currently being served or waiting in scheduled queues.
getNextParallel(ServicePoint, ServicePointTree) - Static method in class model.serviceObjects.ServicePointType
Chooses an available parallel service point under the next routed child.
getNextService(ServicePoint, ServicePointTree) - Static method in class model.serviceObjects.ServicePointType
Chooses the next child router/service point using the current service point's routing table.
getParallels() - Method in class model.ServicePoint
Gets this service point's parallel alternatives.
getSelf() - Method in class model.serviceObjects.ServicePointTree
Gets the service point represented by this node.
getServed() - Method in class model.ServicePoint
Gets the number of customers that have completed service here.
getService() - Method in class model.Event
Gets the target service point.
getServiceCount() - Method in class model.ServicePoint
Gets the cumulative routing table for this service point.
getServiceRoot() - Method in class model.Simulation
Gets the root of the service-point tree.
getSPId() - Method in class model.ServicePoint
Gets the service-point identifier.
getTime() - Method in class model.Event
Gets the scheduled event time.
getTime() - Method in class model.Simulation
Gets the current simulation time.
getToString() - Method in class model.serviceObjects.ServicePointTree
Builds a formatted description of this tree node.
getTotalTime() - Method in class model.ServicePoint
Gets the elapsed simulation time since this point was created.
getType() - Method in class model.Event
Gets the event type.

H

hasChildren() - Method in class model.serviceObjects.ServicePointTree
Checks whether this node has child routes.

I

incDelay() - Method in class model.Simulation
Increases the UI animation delay by ten percent.
isActive() - Method in class model.ServicePoint
Reports whether this service point can accept a customer at the current simulation time.
isAvailableAt(int) - Method in class model.ServicePoint
Checks availability at a specific simulation time.
isBusy() - Method in class model.ServicePoint
Checks whether this service point is currently busy.
isEmpty(int) - Method in class model.PhaseQueue
Checks whether a phase queue has no customers.
isInSystem(int) - Method in class model.Event
Determines whether this event's customer should be counted as in the system.
isRushHour(int) - Method in class model.Simulation
Checks whether a simulation time falls within one of the configured rush hours.

M

main(String[]) - Static method in class view.App
Launches the JavaFX application.
model - package model
 
model.database - package model.database
 
model.phases - package model.phases
 
model.serviceObjects - package model.serviceObjects
 

P

parse(String, String) - Static method in class controller.Detailinator
Prepends the newest detail entry to the existing detail log text.
peek() - Method in class model.EventQueue
Returns the earliest event without removing it.
PhaseQueue - Class in model
Stores customers in separate priority queues for each simulation phase.
PhaseQueue() - Constructor for class model.PhaseQueue
Creates the four phase queues used by the simulation.
poll(int) - Method in class model.PhaseQueue
Removes and returns the next customer from a phase queue.
printTree(int) - Method in class model.serviceObjects.ServicePointTree
Prints this subtree to standard output using hyphens for indentation.
processBEvent(Event) - Method in class model.ServicePoint
Processes a phase-B event for this service point.
progress() - Method in class model.EventQueue
Removes and returns the earliest event in the queue.

R

readQueue(int) - Method in class model.EventQueue
Reads all events scheduled at a specific time without mutating the primary queue.
recordCustomerResponseTime(int) - Method in class model.Simulation
Records a completed customer's total response time.
reserveTime(int) - Method in class model.ServicePoint
Reserves this service point for the full duration of a future service.
ROUTING - Enum constant in enum class model.Event.Type
Routes a customer to a service point.
run() - Method in class model.Simulation
Builds the service tree, generates customer arrivals, advances simulation phases until the configured maximum time, records UI metrics, and saves the final performance data.

S

save(List<ServicePoint>, List<Integer>) - Method in class model.database.SimulationResultRepository
Saves all service-point and customer response-time data in a single database transaction.
scheduleB(Event) - Method in class model.Simulation
Schedules a start-service or end-service event.
scheduleC(Event) - Method in class model.Simulation
Schedules a routing event.
ServicePoint - Class in model
Represents a service station in the simulation, including its parallel service stations, routing odds, service timing, utilization, and completed-customer metrics.
ServicePoint(Simulation, int, int[][]) - Constructor for class model.ServicePoint
Creates a service point with a base service duration and routing table.
ServicePointTree - Class in model.serviceObjects
Tree structure that models the service-point routing hierarchy used by the simulation.
ServicePointTree(ServicePoint, int, Simulation) - Constructor for class model.serviceObjects.ServicePointTree
Creates a service-point tree node and recursively builds the expected child structure for the supplied depth.
ServicePointType - Class in model.serviceObjects
Routing helper methods for choosing child and parallel service points.
ServicePointType() - Constructor for class model.serviceObjects.ServicePointType
 
serviceTotalCount() - Method in class model.serviceObjects.ServicePointTree
Counts all service points represented by this subtree, including parallels.
setDelay(int) - Method in class model.Simulation
Sets the UI animation delay between simulation ticks.
setFourth() - Method in class model.ServicePoint
Marks this service point as the shared tier-four terminal service point.
setInSystem(boolean) - Method in class model.Event
Marks whether this event's customer is already in the system.
setParallels(int) - Method in class model.ServicePoint
Creates parallel service points that share this point's identifier and routing behavior.
setServiceTime(int) - Method in class model.Customer
Calculates and stores the customer's elapsed service time.
setTime(int) - Method in class model.Event
Updates the scheduled event time.
Simulation - Class in model
Runs the discrete-event call-center simulation and coordinates all simulation phases, event queues, generated customers, UI updates, and persistence of performance results.
Simulation(Controller, int, int[]) - Constructor for class model.Simulation
Creates a simulation thread.
SimulationResultRepository - Class in model.database
Persists finished simulation performance data using the schema in Queries/Project.sql.
SimulationResultRepository() - Constructor for class model.database.SimulationResultRepository
 
start(Stage) - Method in class view.App
Loads the FXML UI, attaches the controller, and shows the primary stage.
START_SERVICE - Enum constant in enum class model.Event.Type
Starts service for a customer at a service point.

V

valueOf(String) - Static method in enum class model.Event.Type
Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name.
values() - Static method in enum class model.Event.Type
Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.
view - package view
